description:
You are logged into Redmine as admin and currently viewing a project page in Firefox. Create a new sub-project under the current project with the following configuration:

- Project Name: Electrical Interconnection
- Identifier: electrical-interconnection
- Description: Manages the electrical interconnection phase including utility coordination, grid compliance testing, and commissioning activities.
- Homepage: (leave blank)
- Public: Unchecked (private)
- Modules to ENABLE: Issue tracking, Time tracking, Gantt chart, Calendar, Wiki
- Modules to DISABLE: News, Documents, Files, Repository, and Forums/Boards
- Trackers: Bug, Feature, Support (default)
